title: Orobus flaccidus
taxonomy: Orobus flaccidus is classified as a member of the Fabaceae family. This family is commonly known as the legume family and includes a wide variety of flowering plants. Orobus flaccidus is a genus within the subfamily Faboideae. Within its genus, Orobus flaccidus is often classified alongside other similar species such as Orobus peregrinus and Orobus alpinus.
